query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name LIKE '%reav%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name LIKE '%reav%';
